quotes: Confident, not boastful — first-of-its-kind significance stated clearly and directly, never overstated or sensationalized.
Warm, not overly emotional — genuine empathy about DM's daily impact; patients at the center.
Clear, not complicated — plain, respectful language; easy to understand without losing accuracy.
Tone may flex slightly by context; core voice never changes.

rules.intent: Ensure consistent, empathetic, and professional brand communications.
rules.rule_text: Lisraya communications must adhere to the three core brand voice and tone principles: 1) Confident, not boastful—stating significance clearly and directly without sensationalism; 2) Warm, not overly emotional—showing genuine empathy for daily DM impact; and 3) Clear, not complicated—using plain, respectful, and accurate language. Tone may flex slightly by context, but core voice never changes.
